author: chillfinanceguy
post:
this is hilarious.. u know what’s really driving this insane 2 week rally?

forced buying.

this is NOT some clean, high-conviction rally where big money suddenly believes everything is bullish again. this is mechanical, rules-based buying.

headline algos started buying first. that initial move then squeezed hedge funds that were short, forcing them to cover. once price kept pushing, ctas had to step in and buy because their models are momentum based. then options dealers had to buy the underlying to hedge and stay neutral.

that means this rally is being fueled by systematic flows, short covering, and dealer hedging.

not conviction. we are at the end is the business cycle and will head into a recession, not a matter of IF moreso a matter of WHEN
